lineups.title: A Main One-Way Smoke
lineups.description: Stand in A lobby and throw Poison Cloud to create a one-way smoke on A Main, blocking defender pushes while giving you a pixel peek advantage.

lineups.title: Mid to B Site Double Smoke
lineups.description: From mid market, use Toxic Screen wall + Poison Cloud to block both B main and B tower simultaneously — lets your team walk onto B site safely.

lineups.title: A Site Recon Bolt (Post-Plant)
lineups.description: After planting on A site, use this 2-bounce Recon Bolt lineup from A generator to reveal anyone defusing the spike behind A tree.

lineups.title: B Site Aggro Recon from Spawn
lineups.description: From B spawn, bounce this Recon Bolt through the double box to light up attackers moving through B main before they reach site.

lineups.title: B Site 3-Smoke Executes
lineups.description: From A spawn hallway you can call three smokes simultaneously — B CT, B tower, and B short — giving your team a clean execute with all angles covered.

lineups.title: A Site Wall Split Through Teleporter
lineups.description: Place Toxic Screen so it runs from outside A short through the hookah teleporter exit, cutting off A site and A bath simultaneously.

lineups.title: B Site Shock Dart Post-Plant
lineups.description: After planting on B site, this shock dart lineup from B short bounces into the B site corner next to the box, killing anyone who peeks or defuses.

lineups.title: A Site Full Execute Smokes
lineups.description: Smoke A bath, A site CT, and showers door simultaneously from A short to lock down all three angles for a clean A site execute.

lineups.title: C Site Wall from Mid
lineups.description: From mid, use Toxic Screen to split C long and C site in half, then Poison Cloud C garage — lets you execute while isolating the site defender.

lineups.title: B Site Aggro Drone + Recon
lineups.description: Use Owl Drone to spot A and B simultaneously in early rounds from B hall, then follow up with a Recon Bolt into A main to gather full map info.

lineups.title: B Site Box Poison Cloud
lineups.description: Throw Poison Cloud onto the B site snowman box from B tube — creates a powerful one-way smoke that covers the site defender's common angle.

lineups.title: A Site Recon through Rafters
lineups.description: From A main, aim this 1-bounce Recon Bolt to hit the underside of the A rafters — it bounces down and lights up both A corner and A site defenders.

lineups.title: A Site Mid-Rotate Block Smokes
lineups.description: Smoke A art, A site CT, and mid link simultaneously from A main — prevents defenders from rotating mid and isolates A site for your team.

lineups.title: B Site Toxic Screen Mid Control
lineups.description: Run Toxic Screen from B main through the B site archway — used defensively to deny attackers vision and slow the B main push in early rounds.

lineups.title: A Site Triple-Bounce Post-Plant Reveal
lineups.description: After planting on A site, use this precise 3-bounce Recon Bolt from outside A to sweep the spike area and reveal any defuser — safe positioning included.

lineups.title: C Site Wall Through Rock
lineups.description: Unique Toxic Screen lineup that passes through the rock formation between mid and C — splits C site perfectly for a clean mid-to-C execute.

lineups.title: A Site Recon from Ramps
lineups.description: From A ramps, use this 2-bounce bolt to clear A heaven and the A site back-corner simultaneously before your team pushes onto site.

lineups.title: B Site Heaven + CT Smokes
lineups.description: Smoke B heaven and B CT from B main to deny both high ground and rotation angles — pairs perfectly with a Sage wall to make B pushes unstoppable.
